criteria.description: compliance-check fuzzy matches customer name against mooncake-cc.json
criteria.evidence: SKILL.md contains complete fuzzy match logic with /‐delimiter split and case-insensitive partial match

criteria.description: Matched CC emails written to casehealth-meta.json
criteria.evidence: SKILL.md writes ccEmails/ccAccount/ccKnowMePage; meta-schema.md documents all 3 fields

criteria.description: POD alias placeholder replaced with config value
criteria.evidence: SKILL.md contains replacement logic; config.json has podAlias=mcpodvm@microsoft.com
SKILL.md explicitly states '静默跳过，不写 CC 相关字段'

criteria.description: email-drafter adds CC header in initial-response
criteria.evidence: email-drafter.md Step 5 adds **CC:** line conditionally for initial-response
email-drafter.md CC rules explicitly limit to emailType=initial-response
CaseDetail.tsx and DraftsPage.tsx both parse **CC:** regex and render Copy CC button with navigator.clipboard.writeText

criteria.description: Todo CC reminder with CC list
criteria.evidence: E2E: generate-todo.sh produces yellow item with CC emails + Know-Me Wiki link; without ccEmails no CC item appears
config.json contains podAlias field; SettingsPage.tsx reads/writes/displays podAlias
